items.title: Solana outlines quantum-proof roadmap as crypto shifts from theory to preparation
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's commitment to a quantum-proof roadmap enhances its security posture, potentially attracting developers and users concerned about future technological threats.

items.title: Western Union to Launch Solana-Based Stablecoin Plus ‘Stable Card’ Next Month
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of a Solana-based stablecoin by Western Union could increase liquidity and usage within the Solana ecosystem, enhancing its mainstream adoption.

items.title: Solana developers outline plan to protect network from quantum threats
items.whyYouShouldCare: Developers' proactive measures against quantum threats position Solana as a forward-thinking platform, which may bolster confidence among investors and users.
